displayName: Key Vault must use RBAC authorization (not access policies)
description: RBAC-on-Key-Vault unifies access control with the rest of Azure (PIM-eligible, conditional access, scoped role assignments). Access policies are a parallel auth mechanism that escapes the substrate. Required for new vaults; legacy access-policy vaults migrate via separate exemption-tracked work.

metadata.description: Audit, Deny, or Disabled. Defaults to Audit per ADR 0008.
